title: Balloon POOP
description: A neon cyberpunk balloon-popping arcade game with procedural floating, difficulty scaling, 45-second countdown, particle burst effects, and localStorage high-score persistence.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: Procedural floating engine: balloons spawn at random X positions at the bottom threshold and ascend via CSS transition with linear timing
Difficulty progression curves: spawn interval drops from 1200ms→200ms and float duration drops from 4000ms→1200ms per 40-point tier
Click-pop telemetry: single-tap with state lock flag via dataset.popped to prevent multi-pop exploits
Particle burst system: 6-12 radial neon particles per pop with CSS custom property --px/--py controlled fly-away vectors
Score popup floats: transient +points element with animated upward drift and fade-out
45-second countdown chronometer with automatic game-over freeze and premium stats modal
localStorage high-score sync on boot and every game end
3-miss threshold triggers sky shake animation as penalty mechanic
